response.overview: Experience one of the best gigs of 2017 with this new Nathan Carter DVD! Live at 3Arena was filmed live at Nathan's sold out gig in Dublin earlier this year! 20 Tracks live - Bonus songs and exclusive behind the scenes film of the gig! It shows just how Nathan Carter is known as one of the best live entertainers in Ireland! Nathan Carter Live at 3Arena will be released Friday 20th October from Sharpe Music.
response.title: Nathan Carter: Live at 3 Arena
